scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate --prefix backend && npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run db:seed --prefix backend
